summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gab44 V2 Astrology AI Coaching Platform redesign. All major features working excellently including theme system, authentication flows, and UI improvements. Backend issues from previous iteration have been resolved.
passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 12 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Landing page loads with hero section, features, testimonials, pricing, FAQ sections
Theme toggle works perfectly - switches between light and dark modes
Header has transparent glassmorphism effect as designed
Theme persistence works - maintains theme selection after page reload
User registration flow works with birth details (name, date, time, place, email, password)
User login flow works correctly
Dashboard displays correctly after login with all cards and elements
Dashboard cards: Daily Energy, Sun Sign (Gemini), Quick Stats, Action Items, Transit cards
Sun sign calculator works correctly (calculated Gemini for 1990-06-15)
Navigation links work (Features, Testimonials, Pricing, FAQ scroll to sections)
Theme toggle in sidebar works and persists across navigation
AI Chat page accessible and functional with proper interface
Birth Chart page accessible (though limited testing due to session management)
Transits page accessible (though limited testing due to session management)
User authentication and session management works properly
Logout functionality works correctly
Protected routes properly redirect to login when not authenticated
Responsive design elements work well
Glassmorphism effects and modern UI styling implemented correctly
